tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Kid Goku is the young version of Goku during the original Dragon Ball series. He grows up in the mountains and begins a journey to collect the Dragon Balls.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Kid Goku possesses incredible strength, speed, martial arts talent, and the ability to perform the Kamehameha wave.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Goku was originally sent to Earth as a baby Saiyan but forgot his mission after hitting his head.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Bulma is one of the main characters in Dragon Ball and the first friend Goku meets during his adventure.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Although she is not a fighter, Bulma is a genius inventor and technological expert.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Bulma created the Dragon Radar which helps locate Dragon Balls.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Krillin is Goku's closest friend and a skilled martial artist trained by Master Roshi.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Krillin uses techniques like Destructo Disc and Solar Flare in battles.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Krillin is considered one of the strongest human fighters in Dragon Ball.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Master Roshi is an ancient martial arts master who trains Goku and Krillin.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: He created the famous Kamehameha technique and possesses incredible martial arts knowledge.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Despite his humorous personality, Roshi is extremely powerful.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Yamcha is a desert bandit who later becomes a friend of Goku and joins the Z Fighters.

tab2.title: Abilities
tab2.content: Yamcha is skilled in martial arts and uses techniques like Wolf Fang Fist and Spirit Ball.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Yamcha originally appeared as an enemy before becoming an ally.
